source.multipart_basis: Decomposition derived from Cal Poly CDS Rev 14.1 1U practice with PSLV / P-POD deployer interface: four 113.5 mm corner rails, four side frames + two end caps, PC/104 bulkhead with up to 4 boards, separation-switch bracket on -Z, and Helicoil inserts / M2.5 fastener set are canonical for 1U USM-class buses. No rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design the primary structural chassis of a 1U CubeSat as an open-source 1U CubeSat primary structure benchmark. The mission is a low-Earth-orbit technology demonstrator with an on-board UHF amateur-radio payload and a tri-axial magnetometer, targeted for a PSLV or Falcon 9 rideshare deployment from a standard 1U P-POD or equivalent deployer.

Geometry. The structure follows Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification Rev 14.1 for 1U: external envelope 100 mm x 100 mm x 113.5 mm (with +/-0.1 mm tolerance on all faces). Four rails span the full 113.5 mm length with a chamfer of 1 mm x 45 deg at rail ends and a minimum rail-contact region of 8.5 mm wide by 6.5 mm from each end. The structure is machined from 6061-T6 aluminum with wall thickness 2.0 mm on the four side frames and 1.5 mm on the top and bottom caps. One internal bulkhead at Z = 56.75 mm mounts a PC/104 PCB stack (up to four PCBs total). The -Z face carries the separation-spring interface and the deployment-switch cutouts; the +Z face carries a 50 mm x 50 mm payload aperture. Maximum wet mass 1.33 kg per Cal Poly CDS 1U spec.

Material. 6061-T6 aluminum (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, density 2700 kg/m^3, yield strength 276 MPa, ultimate tensile strength 310 MPa). Surface finish: hard anodize MIL-A-8625 Type III 25 um on rails and chemically conductive Alodine 1200S on internal surfaces for ESD bonding. Fasteners are 18-8 stainless M2.5 x 5 mm SHCS with Helicoil inserts in the 2 mm rail walls.

Load cases. (LC1) Launch quasi-static: 8.5 g longitudinal and 3.2 g lateral applied simultaneously per PSLV user manual Section 3.5. (LC2) Launch random vibration: GEVS-STD-7000A qualification level 14.1 g-rms, 20-2000 Hz, applied to each of three axes independently. (LC3) Launch sine sweep: 5-100 Hz at 2.5 g per GEVS-STD-7000A. (LC4) Deployment spring release: 55 N peak, 60 ms half-sine, applied to the -Z face spring interface. (LC5) Shock: 1500 g SRS 100-10000 Hz per MIL-STD-1540E launch-separation shock, applied at the deployer/CubeSat interface.

Pass/fail criteria. (R1) Maximum von Mises stress must not exceed 184 MPa (yield / 1.5) under LC1, LC4, and LC5. (R2) First natural frequency must be above 120 Hz per Cal Poly CDS 1U guidance (higher than 3U due to shorter rail length). (R3) PSD random-vibration 3-sigma stress under LC2 must not exceed yield 276 MPa. (R4) Total wet mass must not exceed 1.33 kg per Cal Poly CDS 1U cap. (R5) Deployment switches must remain accessible and unobstructed with clearance below 0.5 mm at switch locations under all load cases. (R6) Rail dimensional compliance: rails within +/-0.1 mm after all load cases. (R7) Minimum margin of safety MS >= 0.2 on all fasteners per NASA-STD-5020.

Solver and analysis expectations. Linear static structural FEA for LC1 and LC4. PSD random-vibration analysis for LC2. Sine-sweep harmonic response for LC3. Shock-response-spectrum analysis for LC5. Modal analysis for R2. Fastener margin-of-safety calculation per NASA-STD-5020 for R7. Thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required for this structural deliverable.

Deliverables. STEP (AP242) + Parasolid of the complete 1U chassis (four side frames, top and bottom caps, internal bulkhead, rail chamfer detail). Cal Poly CDS rail dimensional compliance report. Mass budget. Structural report covering LC1-LC5 stress extrema, first 6 modal frequencies, PSD 3-sigma stress, SRS peak acceleration transmitted to the PC/104 bulkhead, and fastener MS table.

--- ASSEMBLY RECONFIGURATION ---
This 1U USM-class bus is delivered as a bolted multi-part assembly following CDS 1U practice: (A) four 113.5 mm corner rails with Helicoil inserts in 2 mm wall, hard-anodized to 25 um, (B) four 2.0 mm side frames closing the cage on the X-Y faces (Alodine 1200S for ESD), (C) 1.5 mm +Z end cap with 50 mm x 50 mm payload aperture and 1.5 mm -Z end cap with separation-spring interface and switch cutouts, (D) a single PC/104 bulkhead at Z=56.75 mm hosting up to four boards, (E) separation-switch bracket / spring-boss sub-assembly mounted on -Z cap, (F) Helicoil thread-repair inserts into 2 mm rail walls, and (G) 18-8 stainless M2.5 x 5 mm SHCS fastener set. FEM verification runs on the assembled model only; per-part stress reported. All inherited load magnitudes (LC1-LC5), the 6061-T6 property set, and R1-R7 pass/fail thresholds are preserved verbatim; assembly-scope criteria (R_asm1 connection DCR, R_asm2 Helicoil pull-out margin under SRS shock, R_asm3 switch clearance on assembled model) are added.
short_prompt:
Design the primary structural chassis of a 1U CubeSat for a LEO technology demonstrator with an on-board UHF amateur-radio payload and a tri-axial magnetometer, targeted for a PSLV or Falcon 9 rideshare deployment from a standard 1U P-POD or equivalent deployer.

The structure follows Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification Rev 14.1 for 1U: external envelope 100 mm x 100 mm x 113.5 mm with +/-0.1 mm tolerance. Four rails span the full 113.5 mm length with a chamfer of 1 mm x 45 deg. One internal bulkhead at Z = 56.75 mm mounts a PC/104 PCB stack (up to four PCBs). Maximum wet mass 1.33 kg per Cal Poly CDS 1U spec.

Material: 6061-T6 aluminum (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, density 2700 kg/m^3, yield strength 276 MPa, ultimate tensile strength 310 MPa). Surface finish hard anodize MIL-A-8625 Type III 25 um on rails and Alodine 1200S internally.

Load cases: LC1 8.5 g longitudinal and 3.2 g lateral per PSLV user manual Section 3.5; LC2 GEVS-STD-7000A 14.1 g-rms 20-2000 Hz; LC3 sine sweep 5-100 Hz at 2.5 g per GEVS-STD-7000A; LC4 deployment spring 55 N peak, 60 ms half-sine; LC5 shock 1500 g SRS 100-10000 Hz per MIL-STD-1540E.

prompt.title: 1U CubeSat primary structure benchmark (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Bolted Al 6061-T6 1U CubeSat assembly (100 x 100 x 113.5 mm, <=1.33 kg wet): four 113.5 mm corner rails (hard anodized, Helicoil inserts), four 2.0 mm side frames, 1.5 mm +Z/-Z end caps, PC/104 bulkhead at Z=56.75 mm, -Z switch bracket, and M2.5 SHCS fastener set. Must pass PSLV 8.5 g longitudinal + 3.2 g lateral, GEVS 14.1 g-rms random, MIL-STD-1540E 1500 g SRS shock, modal >=120 Hz, and fastener MS >=0.2 at the assembled level.

geometric_constraints.rail_contact_region: 8.5 mm wide x 6.5 mm from each end

surface_treatment.rails: hard anodize MIL-A-8625 Type III, 25 um

objective.primary: pass Cal Poly CDS 1U + PSLV + GEVS + MIL-STD-1540E + NASA-STD-5020 compliance

parts.name: 1U corner rail (hard-anodized)
parts.role: primary load-path rail contacting P-POD deployer along the full 113.5 mm length; hosts Helicoil inserts in 2 mm wall

geometric_constraints.rail_contact_mm: 8.5 wide x 6.5 mm from each end
geometric_constraints.surface_finish: hard anodize MIL-A-8625 Type III, 25 um

parts.name: side frame (X-Y face, 2.0 mm)
parts.role: side skin tying adjacent rails; internal surface Alodine 1200S for ESD

parts.name: end cap (+Z payload aperture / -Z separation interface, 1.5 mm)
parts.role: end plate; +Z has 50 x 50 mm payload aperture, -Z has separation-spring interface and switch cutouts

parts.name: PC/104 bulkhead (Z=56.75 mm)
parts.role: internal bulkhead at mid-Z hosting up to 4 PC/104 boards

parts.name: separation-switch bracket / spring boss (-Z)
parts.role: bolts to -Z cap; provides spring-boss interface and switch cutouts for LC4 deployment

parts.name: Helicoil thread-repair insert
parts.role: locking Helicoil inserts into 2 mm rail walls per NASA-STD-5020 to raise thread pull-out under SRS shock

parts.name: M2.5 x 5 mm SHCS fastener set
parts.role: bolts rails/side frames/end caps/bulkhead/switch bracket; 18-8 stainless per Cal Poly CDS 1U baseline

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: CDS Rev 14.1 1U: +Z along rail; -Z face is P-POD separation interface

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection demand-to-capacity ratio (DCR) across rail/side-frame/end-cap/bulkhead bolted interfaces <= 1.0 under governing LC5 MIL-STD-1540E SRS shock.
Helicoil-insert pull-out margin in 2 mm rail wall under LC5 1500 g SRS must remain >= 0.2 per NASA-STD-5020 (i.e. peak fastener tensile load / insert pull-out capacity <= 0.83).
Assembled-model deployment-switch clearance: switch cutouts on -Z end cap must remain >= 0.5 mm clear of switch-bracket and adjacent side-frame edges under LC1+LC4 combined deformation.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.
Generated coverage gate: ensures the declared load case is present in the CCX deck and checked from model.dat.

interfaces.mediated_by: M2.5 SHCS through side-frame edge into rail Helicoils
interfaces.load_path: corner rail (A) transfers shear into side frame (B); frame closes shear circuit around Z-axis.

interfaces.mediated_by: M2.5 SHCS through end cap into rail end tapped Helicoils
interfaces.load_path: rail (A) end reactions enter +Z/-Z end caps (C); LC1 longitudinal + LC5 shock flow through end-cap bolts.
side frame (B) edge bolts to end cap (C), providing torsional closure of the 1U cage.

interfaces.mediated_by: M2.5 SHCS through bulkhead into rail Helicoils at Z=56.75
interfaces.load_path: PC/104 bulkhead (D) hangs between four rails (A); PCB stack inertia under LC1/LC2/LC5 reacts into rails.

interfaces.mediated_by: M2.5 SHCS bolt pattern on -Z end cap
interfaces.load_path: separation-switch bracket (E) bolted to -Z end cap (C); LC4 55 N spring reaction and switch compression load flow through bracket into -Z cap and then into rails.

interfaces.mediated_by: Helicoil inserts installed into rail tapped holes
interfaces.load_path: Helicoil (F) acts as the capacity-limiting element for every bolted interface into rail (A); under LC5 SRS shock insert pull-out dominates fastener margin of safety.

fem_check_policy.rationale: Cal Poly CDS 1U + PSLV + MIL-STD-1540E compliance is defined on the integrated 1U bus: rail tolerance, switch clearance, and Helicoil pull-out margin only exist on the assembled, pre-tensioned model.

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Structural deliverable only; thermal cycling handled separately in the thermal-control subsystem.
exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Covered by electronics-level TID analysis, not structural.

notes.why_multi_part: CDS 1U buses use thin 2 mm rail walls with Helicoil inserts to survive SRS shock; fastener MS per NASA-STD-5020 (R7) is an inherently multi-part, preload-dependent check that cannot be captured in a monolithic model.
notes.speculation_caveats: Helicoil count, switch-bracket footprint, and bulkhead pattern are programmatic speculation within Cal Poly CDS 1U practice.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
